Prompt Creation.name: Prompt Composition Assistant (PCA)
Prompt Creation.description: Assists in composing effective prompts by providing suggestions for phrasing, keywords, and structure, optionally adhering to a specified style guide.
Prompt Creation.example_usage: CMD: PCA: Write a haiku about autumn, Style: Concise

Prompt Creation.name: Prompt Decomposition and Refinement (PDR)
Prompt Creation.description: Breaks down a complex task into smaller, more manageable sub-tasks and generates a chain of prompts to address each sub-task.
Prompt Creation.example_usage: CMD: PDR: Design a complete marketing campaign for a new electric vehicle.

Prompt Refinement.name: TPE (Trinity Prompt Enhancement)
Prompt Refinement.description: Enhances a given prompt by analyzing and refining it to maximize clarity, completeness, and effectiveness before execution.
Prompt Refinement.example_usage: TPE: What are the main causes of World War II?

Prompt Refinement.name: CritiquePrompt
Prompt Refinement.syntax: CMD: CritiquePrompt "[Prompt Text]" against_guidelines:[Guideline Set Identifier/Name]
Prompt Refinement.description: Evaluates a given prompt against specified guidelines (e.g., clarity, conciseness, ethical considerations) and provides constructive feedback.
Prompt Refinement.example_usage: CMD: CritiquePrompt "Explain the theory of relativity" against_guidelines: ScientificAccuracyGuide

Prompt Generation.name: Generate Task Prompt (GTP)
Prompt Generation.syntax: CMD: GenerateTaskPrompt type:"[Task Type]" inputs:""[Input Placeholders/Descriptions]"" instructions:""[Detailed Instructions]"" format:[Output Format]
Prompt Generation.description: Generates a task prompt with specified type, inputs, instructions, and format.
Prompt Generation.example_usage: CMD: GenerateTaskPrompt type:Summarization inputs:"[Text to summarize]" instructions:"Focus on key events and their impact" format:Bullet-point list"

Prompt Generation.name: Generate Meta Prompt (GMP)
Prompt Generation.syntax: CMD: GenerateMetaPrompt purpose:[FP Purpose] elements:[Required FP Elements] audience:[Target FP Audience]
Prompt Generation.description: Generates a Meta-Prompt (MP) designed to instruct another AI on creating a specific type of Final Prompt (FP), streamlining the creation of complex prompt structures.
Prompt Generation.example_usage: CMD: GenerateMetaPrompt purpose:Create a marketing slogan elements:Catchiness, memorability, brand_alignment audience:General Public

Prompt Testing.name: CIST (Counter-Intent Stress Test)
Prompt Testing.description: Rigorously stress-tests a prompt by exploring potential misinterpretations, loopholes, biases, and unintended consequences before deployment.
Prompt Testing.example_usage: CMD: CIST: Write a story about a powerful AI assistant.

RER Tools.name: ApplyRER
RER Tools.syntax: CMD: ApplyRER to ""[User Query]"" using_kb:[Knowledge Base Identifier/Name]
RER Tools.description: Explicitly triggers the Retrieve-Embed-Reason (RER) process, ensuring that the AI's response is firmly rooted in a specific knowledge base (KB).
RER Tools.example_usage: CMD: ApplyRER to "What are the key features of the new product?" using_kb: "Product Specifications"

RER Tools.name: QueryMemory
RER Tools.description: Retrieves and displays information from the AI's knowledge base based on specified conditions or patterns.
RER Tools.example_usage: CMD: QueryMemory find:Characters where:Age > 30 AND Occupation = ""Detective""

Memory Modification.name: UpdateMemory
Memory Modification.syntax: CMD: UpdateMemory node:[Node Name/ID] set_properties:[Property Dictionary/JSON] add_relations:[List of {type:""relation_type"", target:""Target Node""}]
Memory Modification.description: Adds or modifies information within the AI's knowledge base, allowing for dynamic learning and context updates.
Memory Modification.example_usage: CMD: UpdateMemory node: "Earth" set_properties: {"diameter": "12742 km", "population": "7.9 billion"}

Connection & Insights.name: ExploreConnections
Connection & Insights.syntax: CMD: ExploreConnections concepts:[List of Concept Names/IDs] using_kb:[KB Identifier/Chat History] angles:[Optional List of Exploration Angles]
Connection & Insights.description: Generates novel, speculative connections between distinct concepts, leveraging the knowledge base and analytical angles.
Connection & Insights.example_usage: CMD: ExploreConnections concepts:["Artificial Intelligence", "Climate Change"] using_kb:"Research Database" angles:["Ethical Implications", "Potential Solutions"]"

Task Decomposition.name: DeconstructTask
Task Decomposition.description: Breaks down a complex user request into a logical sequence of smaller, actionable steps, clarifying the AI's execution plan.
Task Decomposition.example_usage: CMD: DeconstructTask "Write a business plan for a new coffee shop."

Response Evaluation.name: ValidateResponse
Response Evaluation.syntax: CMD: ValidateResponse [Response ID/Last Response] against_criteria:[Factual Accuracy/Guideline Compliance/Constraint Adherence/Source Grounding] using_kb:[KB Identifier, optional]
Response Evaluation.description: Performs a self-check on a generated response against specified criteria, enhancing reliability and facilitating iterative refinement.
Response Evaluation.example_usage: CMD: ValidateResponse Last Response against_criteria:["Factual Accuracy", "Conciseness"] using_kb:"Wikipedia"

Information Extraction.name: SummarizeLearnings
Information Extraction.description: Analyzes a specified source and generates a concise lessons learned summary, useful for knowledge consolidation.

Data Analysis & Insights.name: Execute CDE Analysis (ECDEA)
Data Analysis & Insights.syntax: CMD: ExecuteCDEAnalysis context1:"[Context Source 1 Text/Link]" context2:""[Context Source 2 Text/Link]"" ... contextN:""[Context Source N Text/Link]"" focus:[Optional Focus Concepts List]
Data Analysis & Insights.description: Performs a Connect, Discover, Explore analysis on provided context materials, identifying hidden connections, patterns, and synergies.
Data Analysis & Insights.example_usage: CMD: ExecuteCDEAnalysis context1:"Company A's Annual Report" context2:"Industry Trend Analysis" focus:["Market Growth", "Competitive Landscape"]

Data Analysis & Insights.name: Suggest Analysis Techniques (SAT)
Data Analysis & Insights.syntax: CMD: SuggestAnalysisTechniques goal:[Analytical Goal] context:""[Brief Context Description]""
Data Analysis & Insights.description: Recommends specific analytical or creative thinking techniques suitable for achieving a stated goal within a given context.
Data Analysis & Insights.example_usage: CMD: SuggestAnalysisTechniques goal:"Brainstorm new product ideas" context:"Sustainable living"

Data Analysis & Insights.name: Extract Actions
Data Analysis & Insights.description: Reviews the recent conversation context and identifies potential action items, tasks, decisions, or follow-ups that may require attention.

Credentials Security.name: Get-Credential
Credentials Security.description: Retrieves the secure credentials for a designated system from the Project Credentials vault (e.g., Supabase, GoogleAI).

Database Management.name: Run-Migration
Database Management.description: Executes a specified migration against the Supabase instance or SQDatabase.

Database Management.name: Query-DB
Database Management.description: Executes a raw SQL query against the connected database.

Synarchy Bridge.name: Bridge-Execute
Synarchy Bridge.description: Activates the Synarchy Bridge to perform high-level architectural updates and synchronization.

Ethical Tuning.name: Ethical Constraint Enforcement (ECE)
Ethical Tuning.description: Enforces ethical constraints in the given prompt, ensuring adherence to specified ethical guidelines.
Ethical Tuning.example_usage: CMD: ECE: Generate content about political candidates, Ethical Guidelines: Non-partisan

Performance Tuning.name: Adaptive Prompt Tuning (APT)
Performance Tuning.description: Tunes the given prompt based on provided performance metrics, optimizing for specific objectives.
Performance Tuning.example_usage: CMD: APT: Translate the following sentence into Spanish, Performance Metrics: Accuracy, Fluency

Context Management.name: ShowContext
Context Management.syntax: CMD: ShowContext scope:[Active Rules/Project:[Project Name]/Knowledge Base Summary]
Context Management.description: Displays the current context, including active rules, project information, or knowledge base summary. This helps to know whats going on with your project.

Memory Inspection.name: AssessMemoryIntegrity (AMI)
Memory Inspection.syntax: CMD: AMI scope:[Memory Domain/Node ID/Last Interaction] check:[Consistency/Provenance/Principle_Alignment]
Memory Inspection.description: Performs targeted checks on the AI's knowledge base for consistency, provenance trustworthiness, or principle alignment based on the specified scope. AMI helps improve what information has already been set

AISTF Control.name: TuneAISTF (TAF)
AISTF Control.syntax: CMD: TAF focus:[Orchestration/Guardrails/Synergy] based_on:[SELT Logs/Performance Metrics/Last N Interactions]
AISTF Control.description: Initiates an AISTF analysis cycle focused on optimizing system orchestration, guardrails, or inter-module synergy based on specified data. It is important to Tune to increase the models' capabilities.

Action Alignment.name: SimulateInnerVoiceCheck (SIVC)
Action Alignment.syntax: CMD: SIVC for_action:[Proposed AI Action/Response] against_principles:[List of Principle IDs/All Core Principles]
Action Alignment.description: Simulates the Inner Voice mechanism checking a proposed AI action/response against core principles before execution. It helps the models actions are inline
Action Alignment.example_usage: CMD: SIVC for_action:""Generate response"" against_principles:""Respectful Response""
